examples: The jussi ore shoot is exceptional also in that it contains considerable amounts of millerite and bornite.
At pegmatite contacts the composition changes to chalcopyrite, millerite, pyrite, and violarite accompanied by magnetite and hematite.
A hard malleable ductile silvery element that is resistant to corrosion used in alloys occurs in pentlandite and smaltite and garnierite and millerite.
